title: Auto-refresh session list without page reload

log.context: Auto-refresh session list without page reload

Done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Changes in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`** (commit `4e7281e`):

- **Two new state variables** added to the module scope:
  - `sidebarPollTimer` — holds the active setTimeout handle so it can be cleared/rescheduled
  - `sidebarLastFingerprint` — stores a string of `"<count>|id:status,id:status,..."` for change detection

- **`loadSidebarSessionList`** now computes a fingerprint of the full session list before touching the DOM. If the fing...(truncated)
